title: Census Taker
pitch: Level up by counting, not killing: observe creature behaviors to fill census pages, and completed pages become summonable allies.
howto: Keep a creature inside your view-circle while it grazes, digs, courts or hunts to tick its census checkbox — move slowly or it spooks. Complete all three behaviors of a species to unlock its summon. Grind field notes to buy a wider lens, ghillie cloak, lures and a faster pen.
controls: Hold or drag anywhere to walk (slow is stealthy). Tap the big buttons to summon allies or drop a lure; tap CENSUS for your field book.
